ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-14-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-19-2016 Continued To Nov-14-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Frederic Campagnoli for (petitioner) Lilianna Mangini.

The Court asked for the status on the Inventory & Appraisal. Mr. Campagnoli reported that they were dealing with 3 years of taxes from a foreign resident, that they picked up an entire estate and that they can file the Inventory & Appraisal as well as the Petition for Final Distribution by November. The status on close of estate was continued to November 14, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)
